# omada_vpn (Resource)

Manages a VPN on the Omada gateway. **Only a small subset (name, enable) is managed** via read-modify-write; all other VPN settings are preserved. Its write verbs are inferred (not live-validated) — prefer importing an existing VPN and toggling `enable` over creating/deleting.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Import an existing VPN and manage its enabled state.
resource "omada_vpn" "home" {
  name   = "Home"
  enable = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) VPN name.

### Optional

- `enable` (Boolean) Whether the VPN is enabled.
- `site` (String) Site name. Defaults to the primary site. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `purpose` (Number) VPN purpose code (read-only).
- `site_id` (String)
